query:
-- Reassign the main Site Bundle ($144.30) from S7092 (4G Data Backup) to S0467 (Opticomm 100/40)
UPDATE service_billing_assignments 
SET serviceExternalId = 'S0467'
WHERE billingItemExternalId = 'BI001469' AND serviceExternalId = 'S7092';

-- Remove the one-time number porting charge from S0467 (it's a one-off, not recurring)
DELETE FROM service_billing_assignments 
WHERE billingItemExternalId = 'BI001471' AND serviceExternalId = 'S0467';
